case_title: MOGANNUM, MARYO VS LEVIN, ARNOLD MOBITEL INC. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MOGANNUM, MARYO AS TO DEFENDANT LEVIN, ARNOLD MOBITEL INC. MARCUS STEVEN MOBITEL INC. MOBITEL INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-10-1996 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C
INVALID POS FILED. TWO DEFENDANTS SERVED ON ONE FORM.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LEVIN, ARNOLD MOBITEL INC. MARCUS STEVEN MOBITEL INC. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MOGANNUM, MARYO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-13-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOGANNUM, MARYO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOBITEL INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,015.00, JUDGMNT ONLY AGNST MOBITEL INC NOT AGAINST INDIV. LEVIN, ARNOLD & MARCUS, STEVEN. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-10-1996, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-13-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
POS ON PLFF(MARYO)"INVALID":SUB/NO MLNG;SUB/NONAME OF PARTY SRVD;EVEN IF SUB VALID,UNTIMELY;EVEN IF PER'L,ALSO UNTIMELY.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT MOBITEL INC. RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT MOGANNUM, MARYO $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $64.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,064.50, JUDGMNT ONLY FOR MOBITEL INC NOT FOR INDIV. LEVIN, ARNOLD & MARCUS STEVEN. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
